title: fraxinus malacophylla f. retusifoliolata
intro: Fraxinus malacophylla f. retusifoliolata is a variant of the Fraxinus malacophylla tree, also known as the Chinese ash tree. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus malacophylla f. retusifoliolata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
